Academic Career Days Held Online

13.06.2022

Ibn Haldun University Academic Career Days was held online on 11-12 June.

In the program, our academicians introduced the rich range of master's and doctoral programs offered by Ibn Haldun University in social sciences. prof. Dr. Bilal Aybakan, Prof. Dr. Hasan Kaplan, Prof. Dr. Mustafa Kemal Yılmaz, Prof. Dr. Halil Berktay, Prof. Dr. Ramazan Aras, Prof. Dr. İsmail Arda Odabaşı, Prof. Dr. Sefa Bulut, Assoc. Dr. Enis Doko, Assoc. Dr. Murat Turgut, Assoc. Dr. Ali Osman Kuşakcı, Dr. Instructor Member Abdullah Enes Tuzgen, Dr. Instructor Member Ahmet Kaplan and Dr. Instructor In the promotions organized with the participation of its member Ercüment Asil, questions about our graduate programs were answered.

Also, Prof. Dr. İsmail Arda Odabaşı, Dr. Instructor Member M. Fatih Calisir and Dr. Instructor "Things to Consider in the Overseas Graduate Education Plan", "Out of Field Master's/PhD: Advantages-Disadvantages" and "How to Prepare a Research Proposal?" given by Vehbi Baysan. In the seminars titled, guidance and experience were shared in order for the candidates to make a difference in their academic careers.
